name: Fragile Preferences: A Deep Dive Into Order Effects in Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2506.14092v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in decision-support systems for high-stakes domains such as hiring and university admissions, where choices often involve selecting among competing alternatives. While prior work has noted position biases in LLM-driven comparisons, these biases have not been systematically analyzed or link...
author: Haonan Yin, Shai Vardi, Vidyanand Choudhary
